name: Ninja Stickman Warrior HTML5
description: The Stickman Ninja Warrior game presents a distinctive puzzle-solving experience. In this game, your mission is to liberate prisoners using the limited supply of shurikens at your disposal. Exercise caution and strategic thinking as you navigate through a series of unique and challenging levels. Website Developer <a href='https://www.crazygamesonline.com/'>https://www.crazygamesonline.com/</a>
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: Android, Arcade, HTML5, Mentolatux, Mobile, Shoot, Stickman, Warrior
